Home / VPN & Private Networks / OpenVPN Community

OpenVPN Community — open source alternative

The veteran open source VPN with TLS and broad client support.

Strengths

  • Runs through firewalls via TCP/443 when needed.
  • Mature ecosystem of GUIs and Access Server add-ons.
  • Flexible auth — certs, user/pass, MFA plugins.

Weaknesses

  • Slower than WireGuard on comparable hardware.
  • Config is more verbose; cert management is non-trivial.
  • Commercial Access Server is a different licence.
License: GPL-2.0 Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Self-host onlyDesktop: Windows, macOS, LinuxMobile: iOS, Android

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

OpenVPN Community is used as an alternative to

NordVPN

Consumer VPN subscription with a large server network.

See all alternatives →

ExpressVPN

Premium consumer VPN known for streaming reliability.

See all alternatives →
